heading: Misbranded fur products
label: 69b Misbranded fur products
notes: Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of Federal Trade Commission, with certain exceptions, to Chairman of such Commission, see Reorg. Plan No. 8 of 1950, § 1, eff. , 15 F.R. 3175, , set out under .May 24, 195064 Stat. 1264section 41 of this title
amendments: Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of Federal Trade Commission, with certain exceptions, to Chairman of such Commission, see Reorg. Plan No. 8 of 1950, § 1, eff. , 15 F.R. 3175, , set out under .May 24, 195064 Stat. 1264section 41 of this title

children.text: if it is falsely or deceptively labeled or otherwise falsely or deceptively identified, or if the label contains any form of misrepresentation or deception, directly or by implication, with respect to such fur product;

children.label: A
children.text: the name or names (as set forth in the Fur Products Name Guide) of the animal or animals that produced the fur, and such qualifying statement as may be required pursuant to ;section 69e(c) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: that the fur product contains or is composed of used fur, when such is the fact;

children.label: C
children.text: that the fur product contains or is composed of bleached, dyed, or otherwise artificially colored fur, when such is the fact;

children.label: D
children.text: that the fur product is composed in whole or in substantial part of paws, tails, bellies, or waste fur, when such is the fact;

children.label: E
children.text: the name, or other identification issued and registered by the Commission, of one or more of the persons who manufacture such fur product for introduction into commerce, introduce it into commerce, sell it in commerce, advertise or offer it for sale in commerce, or transport or distribute it in commerce;

children.label: F
children.text: the name of the country of origin of any imported furs used in the fur product;
if the label required by paragraph (2)(A) of this section sets forth the name or names of any animal or animals other than the name or names provided for in such paragraph.
